title: From Singapore to Vietnam: Turning Strategic Ties into Smart Investments
metaDescription: An insightful online session for Singapore-based business owners, SME leaders and startup founders expanding into Vietnam, led by WTP Advisory with Vanguard Financial Group, Baker & McKenzie Vietnam and Vietcombank.
about: Join us for an insightful event designed for Singapore-based business owners, SME leaders, and startup founders seeking to expand into Vietnam. This event is led by WTP Advisory in collaboration with Vanguard Financial Group, Baker & McKenzie Vietnam, and Vietcombank.

matters.heading: Ready to Grow Your Business in One of ASEAN's Most Vibrant Markets?
body: As Vietnam rises as a strategic growth hub, Singapore remains its second-largest foreign investor with nearly 4,000 active projects worth over US$84 billion. With deepening bilateral ties and expanding opportunities across tech, clean energy, and sustainable infrastructure, the time to act is now.
Join us for an exclusive 1-hour online session designed for Singaporean business owners, startup founders and SME decision makers looking to expand and scale confidently into Vietnam.
